title: anthoxanthum quebrada
intro: Anthoxanthum quebrada, also known as Quebrada Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family (Poaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum quebrada include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Anthoxanthum quebrada is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat fever and cough.
